tool.name: telegram_export_chat
tool.description: Export chat history from a Telegram chat. Searches for the chat, opens it, scrolls up to load more messages, and scrapes all visible messages into a structured format with author, content, timestamp, and direction.

parameters.name: chat_name
parameters.description: Name of the chat, group, or channel to export messages from

parameters.name: message_count
parameters.description: Approximate number of messages to export (default: 50). More messages require more scroll time.
